EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IImageServiceInfo

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to the properties of an image service.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("BFCD28A7-B02F-4C5D-AA7E-D0BA474D5192")]
public interface IImageServiceInfo

Properties

AllowedCompressions

The list of allowed client controllable transmition compressions.

string AllowedCompressions { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

The list of visible field names.

string AllowedFields { get; set; }

Property Value

string

string AllowedItemMetadata { get; set; }

string

string

int BandCount { get; }

int

string

The default transmission compression, None, LZ77, JPEG.

string DefaultCompression { get; set; }

string

int

int

int

iBand int

Gets the pxiel size of the image service, in its native units.

pDx double
pDy double

pMin double
